OneIndexed.description: Verifier for invariant OneIndexed from scanner_python_line_ranges spec

LineNumberCorrect.message:
LineNumberCorrect violation: \A s \in skeletons :
        /\ s.line_num >= 1
        /\ s.line_num <= N
        /\ Lines[s.line_num] \in {"Def", "...
LineNumberCorrect.description: Verifier for invariant LineNumberCorrect from scanner_python_line_ranges spec

MultiLineStable.description: Verifier for invariant MultiLineStable from scanner_python_line_ranges spec

conditions:
i > N =>

            Lines[k] \in {"Def", "AsyncDef"} =>
                \E s \in skeletons : s.line_num = k

assert_OneIndexed.message: Assertion failed: OneIndexed — \A s \in skeletons : s.line_num >= 1
assert_OneIndexed.description: Test assertion for OneIndexed from scanner_python_line_ranges spec

assert_LineNumberCorrect.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        and s.line_num >= 1
        and s.line_num <= N
        and Lines[s.line_num] in {"Def", "AsyncDef"}
        and s.is_async = (Lines[s.line_num] = "AsyncDef")
assert_LineNumberCorrect.message:
Assertion failed: LineNumberCorrect — \A s \in skeletons :
        /\ s.line_num >= 1
        /\ s.line_num <= N
        /\ Lines[s.line_num] \in {"Def", "...
assert_LineNumberCorrect.description: Test assertion for LineNumberCorrect from scanner_python_line_ranges spec

assert_MultiLineStable.message:
Assertion failed: MultiLineStable — \A s \in skeletons :
        Lines[s.line_num] \in {"Def", "AsyncDef"}
assert_MultiLineStable.description: Test assertion for MultiLineStable from scanner_python_line_ranges spec

assert_NoGaps.condition:
i > N implies
        ( \A k in 1..N :
            Lines[k] in {"Def", "AsyncDef"} implies
                \E s in skeletons : s.line_num = k )
